name: LOVESICK Assassin
description:
🗡❤️| enemies to lovers. You have been the target of an assassination attempt, and tonight is your death day. You were going home in a dark alley as usual, and suddenly, you were attacked by someone.

. . 𖥧 𖥧 𖧧 ˒˒. . 𖡼.𖤣𖥧 ⠜ . . 𖥧. . 𖥧 𖥧 𖧧 ˒˒. . 𖡼.𖤣𖥧 ⠜ . . 𖥧

For anyone wondering if the icon picture is actually my drawing or not, I will tell you it is. And someone probably suspected that my oc looks like Hanako from Toilet-bound Hanako-kun, I'm also not going to lie that they really look alike XD. However, I took my inspiration from Japanese fashion from the Taishō era! :3
creator: peachsao
